dialogos.texto_en: With a park this big,\njust moving from one facility to another\nseems tiring, doesn't it.
Oh! then I have good news for you, Raiha-chan!
There seems to be something called\nan electric tour bus, a vehicle\nthat circles around the park.
Wha?!\nWhat's that? I'm curious!
What are you two talking about?
Ah, hey, big bro.
Not only is the size of the park impressive,\nbut there's also an electric powered vehicle\ncompletely circling around it.
Oh, is that so?\nWell, I guess it's necessary considering the size of the park.
There's a guide in the brochure.\nIt seems to stop at designated places, like a bus stop.
Riding this and going around the park\nsounds fun too.
It would take more than a half hour\nto walk from one end to the other.\nSo, I wonder how fast the tour bus goes?
Futaro-kun and Miku, you guys should hold hands and walk together instead of taking the tour bus.
...Why are you suddenly changing the topic?
Well, you're intending to put everything on the line today,\nright?\nFor Miku.
Yeah, something like that.
I figured as much.\nGood luck, big bro!
Ichika.\nUm... Thanks for earlier.
I didn't do anything, did I?\nI just said what I was thinking.
No, thanks to what you said earlier,\nI was able to come up with this plan.\nI'm going to try to get some decent results.
Teehee!\nThat's something you would definitely say.
Huh? Did I say something wrong?
Well, you said you're going to achieve 'some decent results.'\nBut, it's not a test, you know?
Big bro really likes tests, quite literally.
Well, if I'm going through with it, I want to show the best result.
When we're leaving this place,\nIf I see you two holding hands, I'll leave you two to it!
W-we won't be holding hands!
What, you're blushing at this?
You're almost a college student, right? Or are you still a child?
Big bro doesn't like being teased.
It's not like that!\nI just don't like to do it in front of other people!
...The thing is,\nI feel bad for putting you guys through all this trouble,\nfor my own selfish desire.
Don't worry about it.\nWe were supposed to come here the day after tomorrow\nanyway, so it's just a change of schedule.
If Miku doesn't mind, that is.\nI'd like to prioritize her feelings.
Miku's feelings, huh.
Futaro-kun,\nyou know that Miku is a strong girl, right?
Of course.
(That's why I like Miku...)
Yeah, there shouldn't be any problem\nif you manage to tell her how you feel properly.
...The thing is, I feel bad for putting you guys through all this trouble,\nfor my own selfish desire.
Don't worry about it.\nWe were supposed to come here the day after tomorrow\nanyway, so it's just a change of schedule.
That'll be of a big help.
Oh? You look pretty confident.\nDo you really think you can manage to\nhold hands with her before it's time to leave?
I don't know...\nbut if I don't try,\nI won't be able to convey my feelings to Miku, right?
I see. Well, I know you're the type to do it\nwhen the time comes, so I'm sure it'll be okay.
...The thing is, I feel bad for putting you guys through all this trouble,\nfor my own selfish desire.
Don't worry about it.\nWe were supposed to come here the day after tomorrow\nanyway, so it's just a change of schedule.
I see. Thanks a bunch.
Oh, c'mon.\nYou're worrying too much.
Of course I'll worry.\nWe involved you guys in our problem.
What are you saying.\nWe don't believe you've gotten us involved in anything.
You guys' problem is our problem.
We're all gonna enjoy this trip together!
That's right. We all think the same way.
...I see.
(It's all thanks to these guys watching over us,\n that we've been able to make it this far.)
Hey, Futaro-kun.\nIf I'm being honest,\nI'm feeling a little regretful about something.
Regretful? About what?
At the hotel, I pressured you by saying I'm counting on you.
I said it as a means to encourage you,\nbut I'm sorry if I pressured you by accident.
Pressure?\nWhat are you talking about?\nI took it as an encouragement. It actually motivated me.
...Ahh, is that so. Oh, you're such a dork.
You're the one\nwho worries too much.
Touche!
